Binary: lua-sql-sqlite3, lua-sql-sqlite3-dev, lua-sql-postgres, lua-sql-postgres-dev, lua-sql-mysql, lua-sql-mysql-dev, lua-sql-odbc, lua-sql-odbc-dev, lua-sql-duckdb, lua-sql-duckdb-dev, lua-sql-doc
